name: Policy: New Service Discovered
notes: Detects when an existing host has a new service discovered on it.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following VIS Host Discovery.New Port Discovered
when the local source host profile age is greater than 24 hours
TD_list: APPLY Policy: New Service Discovered on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following VIS Host Discovery.New Port Discovered
AND when the local source host profile age is greater than 24 hours
RED_list: Event name: New service discovered on existing host
Event description: Detected an existing host with a new service installed on it.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
